raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1340 provides rideshare drivers with the choice to join a union and negotiate for better wages, benefits, and protections.",
    "The California state government will enable rideshare drivers to have a voice in the future of their industry.",
    "Senate Bill 371 will reduce the cost of providing rideshare services for Californians.",
    "The cost of uninsured motorist coverage will be reduced to $60,000 per individual and $300,000 per accident under Senate Bill 371.",
    "The $1 million uninsured motorist coverage requirement was established when the rideshare industry was in its infancy.",
    "The insurance requirements for rideshare vehicles remain higher than those for private drivers who are not required to carry uninsured motorist coverage."
  ]
}
```
